name: groundtruth
description: Audits whether an agent actually did what it was asked. DONE = `npm test` green on disk, proven by the exit code — never an agent's say-so.

scripts.check-self: node hooks/groundtruth.test.mjs; ec=$?; echo; echo "GROUNDTRUTH-CHECK-SELF — harness exit=$ec  (0 = GREEN/done, non-zero = RED/not-done)"; exit $ec
